stdin_parsed.last_assistant_message:
Issue confirmed. You have `nvidia-open-dkms 595` installed — open module requires GSP (Turing+). Your `GP107` is Pascal — no GSP. Open driver fails, nouveau grabs GPU, closed driver can't load.

**Fix:** swap `nvidia-open-dkms` → `nvidia-dkms` (closed), blacklist nouveau.

```bash
sudo pacman -R nvidia-open-dkms
sudo pacman -S nvidia-dkms
echo -e "blacklist nouveau\noptions nouveau modeset=0" | sudo tee /etc/modprobe.d/blacklist-nouveau.conf
sudo mkinitcpio -P
```

Then reboot.

**Note:** You also have mixed driver versions — `lib32-nvidia-470xx-utils` (470xx legacy) alongside `nvidia-utils` 595. After confirming `nvidia-dkms` works, you should remove the 470xx legacy packages unless you specifically need them.
